name: Charter Hall Group
analysis: CHC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$21.5000. Trade idea: entry A$23.6300, stop A$19.2753, target A$36.6941 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
